fields.name: request_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this hardship assistance request

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the hardship request was submitted

fields.name: source_department
fields.description: Originating department that submitted the request

fields.name: target_department
fields.description: Receiving department responsible for processing the request

fields.name: customer_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the customer requesting hardship assistance

fields.name: customer_name
fields.description: Full name of the customer

fields.name: account_number
fields.description: IBAN of the customer's account subject to the hardship request

fields.name: request_type
fields.description: Classification of the request as hardship assistance

fields.name: hardship_reason
fields.description: Primary reason for the customer's financial hardship

fields.name: hardship_severity
fields.description: Assessment of the severity level of the customer's hardship

fields.name: monthly_income
fields.description: Customer's declared monthly income in GBP

fields.name: monthly_expenses
fields.description: Customer's declared monthly expenses in GBP

fields.name: outstanding_balance
fields.description: Total outstanding balance on the account in GBP

fields.name: monthly_payment_amount
fields.description: Current contractual monthly payment amount in GBP

fields.name: requested_relief_type
fields.description: Array of relief types requested by the customer; each element is a string representing a relief option

fields.name: requested_duration_months
fields.description: Number of months for which the customer is requesting relief

fields.name: supporting_documents
fields.description: Array of supporting document filenames provided by the customer; each element is a string representing a document name

fields.name: contact_number
fields.description: Customer's telephone contact number

fields.name: contact_email
fields.description: Customer's email address for correspondence

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Processing priority level assigned to the request

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the hardship request in the workflow
